metadata.description: Delegate any task to OpenAI's Codex CLI from Claude Code — background jobs, GPT-5.6 model class, session resume, and verification grounded in git rather than the model's self-report

plugins.name: codex-delegate
plugins.description: Use Claude Code as a multi-agent orchestrator with Codex as a delegate. Any task — engineering, research, writing — runs as a background job you can monitor, resume, and verify. Supports GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna at any effort up to ultra.
